title: How to convert a Bug to an Issue and allocate to a Sprint?

posts.author: PureKrome (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
G’Day!

So I’ve been using Sprints and Issues and it’s great.
I want to start recording Bugs via the Bug Queue (template) Board. Bugs will be reported by non-developers.

How can we have a bug ‘convert?’ into an issue. Or at least, ‘create’ a new issue and link the issue to the bug?

Some context: When a bug arrives, we have an automation ping our slack channel and someone in the channel will take ownership. They will review the bug and determine how it should be handled:

  • current sprint?
  • next sprint?
  • backlog
  • Blocked (need more info)
  • Closed (not a bug / not going to be fixed)

As such, this means the bug needs to be an issue.

So do we use automations here?
When “Assigned to a User” then “Create an Issue” and then “Link issue to this Bug” ?

is this even possible?
